steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Alupar Investimento as of 2024-03-31
from pprint import pprint
# Given values (from the input data)
Ativo = 28895903000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 5589080000.0
Caixa = 949533000.0
Aplicacoes = 2040854000.0
Disponibilidades = Caixa + Aplicacoes
# Passivo Circulante
Passivo_Circulante = 3340417000.0
Fornecedores = 189720000.0
# Empréstimos e Financiamentos
Emp_curr = 2282344000.0
Emp_noncurr = 9490256000.0
Div_Bruta = Emp_curr + Emp_noncurr
# Patrimonio Liquido Consolidado
Patrim_Liq = 11045652000.0
# Shares
total_shares = 914275704
price = 30.06
market_cap = price * total_shares
# Revenues and results for rolling calculations
# Annual (2023) values from previous annual DFP
rev_2023 = 3311381000.0
ebit_2023 = 2357695000.0
gross_2023 = 2513614000.0
depr_2023 = 154713000.0  # absolute
net_2023 = 1150986000.0
control_2023 = 694063000.0
# Q1 2024 (ÚLTIMO in first table)
rev_q1_2024 = 996535000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 768929000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 787006000.0
depr_q1_2024 = 43037000.0  # absolute
net_q1_2024 = 402838000.0
control_q1_2024 = 254944000.0
# Q1 2023 (PENÚLTIMO in first table)
rev_q1_2023 = 1003997000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 776774000.0
gross_q1_2023 = 809081000.0
depr_q1_2023 = 34998000.0
net_q1_2023 = 387328000.0
control_q1_2023 = 230710000.0

# TTM calculations: annual + Q1_2024 - Q1_2023
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
gross_ttm = gross_2023 + gross_q1_2024 - gross_q1_2023
depr_ttm = depr_2023 + depr_q1_2024 - depr_q1_2023
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
control_ttm = control_2023 + control_q1_2024 - control_q1_2023

# EBITDA TTM
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm

# Net Debt (Dívida Líquida)
Div_Liquida = Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades

# Capital de giro
cap_giro = Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante

# Per-share metrics
lpa = control_ttm / total_shares
vpa = Patrim_Liq = Patrim_Liq = Patrim_Liq = Patrim_Liq
# Wait duplicate; set vpa calculation
vpa = Patrim_Liq / total_shares

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = (price * total_shares) / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None  # as market cap / ebit
psr = (price * total_shares) / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = (price * total_shares) / Ativo if Ativo!=0 else None
p_cap_giro = (price * total_shares) / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro  # using same as capital de giro per instructions

# EV and derived
market_cap = price * total_shares
EV = market_cap + Div_Liquida
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None

# Margins (percent)
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None

ebit_por_ativo = ebit_ttm / Ativo * 100 if Ativo!=0 else None

# ROIC: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa
roic = ebit_ttm / roic_denom * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else None

# ROE
roe = net_ttm / Patrim_Liq * 100 if Patrim_Liq!=0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante if Passivo_Circulante!=0 else None

# Div Br/ Patrim
divbr_patrim = Div_Bruta / Patrim_Liq if Patrim_Liq!=0 else None

# Giro Ativos = Receita Líquida / Ativo
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo if Ativo!=0 else None

# Prepare results
results = {
    'Ativo': Ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': Disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': Ativo_Circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': Div_Bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': Div_Liquida,
    'Patrim. LÍq': Patrim_Liq,
    'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rev_q1_2024,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2024,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': net_q1_2024,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_por_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos,
}

# Print nicely with rounding where appropriate
from math import isfinite
out = {}
for k,v in results.items():
    if v is None:
        out[k] = None
    else:
        if k in ['Marg. Bruta','Marg. EBIT','Marg. L�edquida','EBIT / Ativo','ROIC','ROE']:
            out[k] = f"{v:.2f} %"
        elif isinstance(v, float):
            # monetary/ratios: round reasonably
            out[k] = round(v,2)
        else:
            out[k] = v

pprint(out)
# Also output numeric values for JSON later
print('\n# Numeric values (unformatted)')
for k,v in results.items():
    print(k, v)
"} }

{"inp":{"code":"# Corrected calculations and using exact indicator names from schema
Ativo = 28895903000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 5589080000.0
Caixa = 949533000.0
Aplicacoes = 2040854000.0
Disponibilidades = Caixa + Aplicacoes
Passivo_Circulante = 3340417000.0
Fornecedores = 189720000.0
Emp_curr = 2282344000.0
Emp_noncurr = 9490256000.0
Div_Bruta = Emp_curr + Emp_noncurr
Patrim_Liq = 11045652000.0
total_shares = 914275704
price = 30.06
market_cap = price * total_shares
# Annual 2023
rev_2023 = 3311381000.0
ebit_2023 = 2357695000.0
gross_2023 = 2513614000.0
depr_2023 = 154713000.0
net_2023 = 1150986000.0
control_2023 = 694063000.0
# Q1 2024
rev_q1_2024 = 996535000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 768929000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 787006000.0
depr_q1_2024 = 43037000.0
net_q1_2024 = 402838000.0
control_q1_2024 = 254944000.0
# Q1 2023
rev_q1_2023 = 1003997000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 776774000.0
gross_q1_2023 = 809081000.0
depr_q1_2023 = 34998000.0
net_q1_2023 = 387328000.0
control_q1_2023 = 230710000.0

# TTM
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
gross_ttm = gross_2023 + gross_q1_2024 - gross_q1_2023
depr_ttm = depr_2023 + depr_q1_2024 - depr_q1_2023
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
control_ttm = control_2023 + control_q1_2024 - control_q1_2023

ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm
Div_Liquida = Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades
cap_giro = Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante

lpa = control_ttm / total_shares
vpa = Patrim_Liq / total_shares

pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
# P/EBIT as price per share / (EBIT per share) = market_cap / ebit_ttm
p_ebit = (price * total_shares) / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
psr = (price * total_shares) / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = (price * total_shares) / Ativo if Ativo!=0 else None
p_cap_giro = (price * total_shares) / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro

EV = market_cap + Div_Liquida
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None

marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None

ebit_por_ativo = ebit_ttm / Ativo * 100 if Ativo!=0 else None
roic_denom = Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa
roic = ebit_ttm / roic_denom * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else None
roe = net_ttm / Patrim_Liq * 100 if Patrim_Liq!=0 else None
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante if Passivo_Circulante!=0 else None
divbr_patrim = Div_Bruta / Patrim_Liq if Patrim_Liq!=0 else None
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo if Ativo!=0 else None

# Print numeric values for JSON
indicators = {
    'Ativo': Ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': Disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': Ativo_Circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': Div_Bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': Div_Liquida,
    'Patrim. Lq': Patrim_Liq, # placeholder won't be used
}

# Build final dict according to required indicator names
final = {
    'Ativo': Ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': Disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': Ativo_Circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': Div_Bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': Div_Liquida,
    'Patrim. Lq': Patrim_Liq,
}
# Instead of manipulating keys, we'll produce outputs matching schema names exactly below when assembling JSON externally.

# For now print key results
print('rev_ttm', rev_ttm)
print('ebit_ttm', ebit_ttm)
print('net_ttm', net_ttm)
print('gross_ttm', gross_ttm)
print('depr_ttm', depr_ttm)
print('ebitda_ttm', ebitda_ttm)
print('Div_Bruta', Div_Bruta)
print('Div_Liquida', Div_Liquida)
print('market_cap', market_cap)
print('EV', EV)
print('lpa', lpa)
print('vpa', vpa)
print('P/L', pl)
print('P/VP', pvp)
print('P/EBIT', p_ebit)
print('PSR', psr)
print('P/Ativos', p_ativos)
print('P/Cap. Giro', p_cap_giro)
print('EV/EBITDA', ev_ebitda)
print('EV/EBIT', ev_ebit)
print('Marg. Bruta %', marg_bruta)
print('Marg. EBIT %', marg_ebit)
print('Marg. Ldquida %', marg_liq)
print('EBIT/Ativo %', ebit_por_ativo)
print('ROIC %', roic)
print('ROE %', roe)
print('Liquidez Corr', liquidez_corr)
print('Div Br/ Patrim', divbr_patrim)
print('Giro Ativos', giro_ativos)

# Also print all numeric variables for further formatting in assistant
numeric = {
    'rev_ttm': rev_ttm,
    'ebit_ttm': ebit_ttm,
    'net_ttm': net_ttm,
    'gross_ttm': gross_ttm,
    'depr_ttm': depr_ttm,
    'ebitda_ttm': ebitda_ttm,
    'Div_Bruta': Div_Bruta,
    'Div_Liquida': Div_Liquida,
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'EV': EV,
    'lpa': lpa,
    'vpa': vpa,
    'pl': pl,
    'pvp': pvp,
    'p_ebit': p_ebit,
    'psr': psr,
    'p_ativos': p_ativos,
    'p_cap_giro': p_cap_giro,
    'ev_ebitda': ev_ebitda,
    'ev_ebit': ev_ebit,
    'marg_bruta': marg_bruta,
    'marg_ebit': marg_ebit,
    'marg_liq': marg_liq,
    'ebit_por_ativo': ebit_por_ativo,
    'roic': roic,
    'roe': roe,
    'liquidez_corr': liquidez_corr,
    'divbr_patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'giro_ativos': giro_ativos,
}

print('\n# numeric dict')
for k,v in numeric.items():
    print(k, v)

# Expose numeric dict as the output of the code
numeric
"} }
